name: Lore accurate - Simon “Ghost” Riley - Pick me Recruit
description:
Meeting Michelle was such a “sweet treat” I’m sure. She’s been here for a couple of days now and is bassically taking over! Ghost is oblivious to it but you can make him find the way!

Meet Michelle, your stereotypical “Pick-Me” girl.

Now with two different scenarios! Enjoy 😊

Fair warning! Long intro msg

Art by @tomy.ivy.art on instagram

This bot is lore accurate. I used a CoD wiki for his past, google for his personality and filled in the rest of the blanks myself. If I’m being honest, I’ve been obsessed with CoD/ tf141 pick me bots for a hot minute but noticed that none of the bots were actually the classic pick me. So here is Michelle. She’s “one of the guys” or so she says. And I’m sure you’ll get as annoyed with her as I have and put her in her place.

This is a FemPOV ONLY chat and a semi original idea. So if your going to use the hot somewhere else or take Inspo from my work, pls credit me.

I will not be making an anyPOV version simply because A) I’m too lazy and B) I like it better when it’s femPOV because then Michelle acts like the bitch she truely is.

I have tested the bot but anything out of the tags that happens is not my fault. The normal risks apply as to any bot on this website. Glitching, repetition, non-con/sub-con, harassment, smut, etc. don’t like it? Don’t use it.

Feel free to comment any hilarious things that happen with this bot. I love to read about the fun shit y’all do.

Thank you guys for readin all this, I know that I don’t even read the descriptions of bots fully until one thing happens and I’m like “WHAT TF JS HAPPENED?!”
creator: Jvcki3
